# url

**Instance Property**

The bookmark’s URL.

## Declaration

```swift
var url: URL { get }
```

## Describing a bookmark or web app

- **iconItemProvider**: An object that conveys the bookmark’s icon to the system.
- **title**: The bookmark’s title.
